Compendium

Personal knowledge repository

Compendium

A personal university knowledge repository — mathematics, physics, computer science, and the things between.

Section · 6 pages Mathematics Articles and coursework, from algebra to differential geometry. Section · 1 page Physics From relativity to quantum mechanics. Section · 1 page Computer Science Algorithms, complexity, and systems. Section · 1 page Chemistry Physical and quantum chemistry. Section · 1 page Master's Thesis Working notes, drafts, and references for the thesis. Section · 1 page Research Reading notes, open questions, ongoing work. Section · 4 pages Mobility Erasmus — learning agreement, course mapping, and the practical critical path. Section · 1 page Languages Academic vocabulary and phrase notes.
